_comment: SLICE_S1_CONTRACT.md §1c — the canonical registry of server-emitted message keys, published beside contracts/openapi.v0.json. S1 seeds exactly the substrate set. i18n-lint extends (guarded activation, S0 pattern): every manifest key must exist x4 locales in each client catalog once client catalogs exist.
